title: Velvety Salty Petit pois Soup
description: A low-fat-friendly Ukrainian dish featuring petit pois and cured meats in a creamy broth that's perfect for those feeling under the weather.
instructions: Cook diced onion in a pot over medium heat until soft.
Add minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Stir in petite pois and simmer for about 5 minutes or until the liquid is absorbed.
Gradually add unsweetened coconut milk, stirring constantly to prevent lumps. Allow mixture to come back to a gentle boil.
Reduce heat to low and stir in low-sodium chicken broth. Simmer gently for 10-15 minutes to allow flavors to meld together.
Fold in chopped cured meats, allowing them to cook until heated through.
Stir in fresh dill if using.
